{{Quote|It's not a Star Destroyer, but it'll do.|Star Cruiser captain|<ref name="GABGCC" />}}
The '''Star Cruiser''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] employed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Characteristics==
It was considered an air cruiser, and was smaller than an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]]. It had [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]]-like wings on each side of the superstructure. The Star Cruiser fired one large laser blast rather than having many smaller cannons.<ref name="GABGCC" />

==History==
The air cruiser had a similar role to the [[Lancet Aerial Artillery]], as they both played the same role in an atmosphere.<ref name="GABGCC" />
Another Imperial [[Warship/Legends|warship]] shared the Star Cruiser's name and was a type of [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]].<ref name="ITW">''[[Inside the Worlds of Star Wars Trilogy]]''</ref><ref name="CL">[[Star Wars: Complete Locations (2005)|''Star Wars: Complete Locations'']]</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
